summary: unit/hashexpire flipped to a fully counted pass after minimal replication stream, HSETEX propagation, COPY field-expiry, and expired_fields fixes.
implementation_notes: SYNC legacy full resync no longer emits +FULLRESYNC; PSYNC still does.
Replication emits SELECT frames when selected db changes, which lets upstream attach_to_replication_stream observe validation propagation.
HSETEX propagation rewrites validation flags to canonical PXAT form.
COPY preserves hash field expiry metadata.
Hash field import-mode zero TTL is handled without eager deletion.
CONFIG RESETSTAT resets expired_fields, and HSET no longer clears the global expired field counter.
notes: The code commit was pushed before this manual harness record was added, leaving the packet dependency graph blocked until this evidence row was appended.
The focused TCL runner completed cleanly with no timeout and no no-summary bucket.
